query:
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status = 'error', 
    finished_at = NOW(), 
    error_message = 'Manually cleared: Cloud Run instance killed during sync (customers stage)'
WHERE status = 'in_progress' 
  AND section = 'Fastfone365';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET status = 'error', 
    finished_at = NOW(), 
    error_message = 'Manually cleared: Cloud Run instance killed during sync (customers stage)'
WHERE status = 'in_progress' 
  AND section = 'Fastfone365';
